head.ledePre: SIT runs as one board. The board is the core; every committee is a module you can plug in.
head.ledePost: a module and plug yourself in.

foot.termComment: # don't be a spectator, become a node

matin.over: As chair I keep an eye on the big picture at SIT and make sure all committees pull in the same direction. My focus this year: making AI4HvA big and putting SIT firmly on the map within the HvA.

idil.over: As secretary I keep things organized: from minutes and planning to communication and follow-up. I track what we agreed on and make sure nobody misses anything. I also bring some energy to really make something great out of it.

wesley.over: As treasurer I watch the money, handle the membership fees and make sure events add up financially. No surprises on the account.

mats.over: As vice chair I am the second face of SIT. I proudly work for better education in the Netherlands and build community for all students. I am involved with EduCo and I help think about the direction of the association and HBO-ICT.

servco.tagline: The tech backbone of SIT, server, site and student projects.
servco.beschrijving: The technical backbone of SIT. ServCo runs the in-house SIT server, renews svsit.nl with student projects, and explores options like game servers and hosting.
servco.missie: Give SIT its own digital infrastructure, built and maintained by students.

community.tagline: The voice of the members, online and offline.
community.beschrijving: Born from merging PR & Socials and Polling. Community handles the online presence of SIT, picks up what students want, and activates members.
community.missie: SIT is here for the students, not the other way around. If we don't know what they want, we can't give them what they need.

educo.beschrijving: Responsible for educational content: workshops, tech talks, and knowledge sessions. Works together with the programme on Fusion classes and events.
educo.missie: Help students grow by organizing workshops, talks and hands-on learning moments.

events.tagline: Drinks, outings and everything that brings SIT together.
events.beschrijving: Focused on fun activities: parties, outings, sports, and gaming events. From pub crawls to Thuishaven, everything that makes SIT social.
events.missie: Make sure SIT members meet each other outside the lecture halls, with events that match what students want.

ai4hva.tagline: The AI community of the HvA.
ai4hva.beschrijving: The AI community of the HvA, officially organized under SIT. AI4HvA is the unique spearhead of SIT, positioning the association as more than just a social club.
ai4hva.missie: Become the go-to place for AI interest at the HvA, with workshops, hackathons and connections to the 5 HvA AI Labs.
activiteiten: Lab Ambassadors at 5 HvA AI Labs

gameit.beschrijving: Gaming related activities and events for SIT members. From casual game nights to D&D campaigns and gaming tournaments.
gameit.missie: Bring gamers within HBO-ICT together with regular game nights, tournaments and community events.

sponsoring.tagline: Connects members with the IT job market.
sponsoring.beschrijving: Finds and maintains sponsor relations with companies. From tech talks to internships, sponsoring makes sure SIT members get in touch with the IT job market.
sponsoring.missie: Build valuable partnerships that deliver something concrete for members: internship chances, workshops, tooling and networking moments.
activiteiten: Reach out to companies and set up partnerships
Organize tech talks and company visits
